What We Do

Our Services

Professional, reliable service for homes and businesses across Torrance and the South Bay.

01

Panel Upgrades & Repairs

Full panel replacements and upgrades to handle modern electrical demands safely.

→
02

Outlet & Switch Installation

New outlets, switches, and USB ports installed to code throughout your home or business.

→
03

EV Charger Installation

Level 2 EV charger installation for all major vehicle brands — ready for the future.

→
04

Lighting Design & Install

Recessed lighting, pendants, and smart lighting systems designed and installed professionally.

→
05

Wiring & Rewiring

Safe rewiring of older homes and new construction wiring by certified electricians.

→
06

Generator Installation

Whole-home standby generators installed and maintained for reliable backup power.

→
